productDisplayName: Fila Men's Basic Low Black Shoe
description: This pair of black lace-up shoes from the Basic Low range of fila are designed for utmost comfort and style. Pair them with casual wear like jeans or cargo pants and inkfruit tees and create a stir wherever you go.Uppers Black canvas uppers with white lining gives great protection and great style White lace-ups ensures a snug Fit Additonal pair of black laces for different look Lightly cushioned insole gives greater comfort Midsole Lightweight midsole for cushioning and shock resistance Outsole Diagonal grooves on outsole ensures greater grip and stability fila branding on the arch Toe guard for greater protection Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
